breaking_news_suggestions.headline: We Updated Our 28-Domain Dashboard Analysis: One Ruler Grew to Many Rooms
breaking_news_suggestions.summary: Part 4.1 now covers the full 28-domain live dashboard (up from 20). Key finding: 14 of 28 domains are static re-references to prior WINs (hardcoded predicted=observed), and 14 share the same fitted constant λ_g. After removing static re-refs, borrowed values, tautologies, and framework recastings, the 9.2σ headline reduces to roughly 1 genuinely-discriminating cell. The dome author's own methodology.json says "display ratio is bookkeeping" — this section is the audit.
breaking_news_suggestions.why_newsworthy: Dashboard expansion from 20 to 28 was a significant site change. The updated analysis shows the new domains are overwhelmingly static re-references — stronger indictment than the prior version.

curmudgeon_queue.note: Mode=bau but interval=30min (should be 240min). Schedule not auto-changed per protocol - flagged for human.
